checks.name: focused_public_contract_test
checks.summary: README, Japanese README, English/Japanese feature maps, playbook template, Story frontmatter, VitePress source exclusion scope, and public playbook link targets expose the UI/UX modernization workflow consistently.

checks.name: compat_or_output_test
checks.summary: Docs-only UI/UX workflow mapping preserves CLI/API/schema/runtime behavior; public docs output is verified by the focused Node test and VitePress build with the playbook corpus not broadly excluded.

checks.name: impact_scope_explained
checks.summary: Story impact scope explicitly limits the change to README/guide copy, VitePress navigation visibility, playbook template, minimal playbook link targets, Story metadata, and Design SSOT registration.

checks.name: responsibility_authority_regression
checks.command: node --test test/responsibility-authority.test.js test/pr-readiness-gate-status.test.js test/review-evidence-handling.test.js test/review-repair.test.js test/evidence-summary-reuse.test.js test/traceability-autobind.test.js test/session-efficiency-audit.test.js test/story-discovery.test.js test/engineering-judgment-activation-precision.test.js test/e2e/story-vibepro-managed-worktree-gate-main.test.js
checks.summary: 72 focused responsibility-boundary regression tests passed for gate DAG, PR lifecycle, agent review lifecycle, evidence lifecycle, runtime cost telemetry, Story source integrity, engineering judgment, and managed worktree locality.

checks.name: public_contract
checks.summary: Changed surfaces are README/docs/VitePress navigation/design SSOT Story registration only; no CLI/API/config schema/output contract changes.

checks.name: design_ssot_registration
